'''R2-K7''' was an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series]] [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. During the [[Rebellion era]], R2-K7 was seen as a member of the [[Mytaranor Slaving Council]], sheepherding prisoners from their cells to auction blocks, and sharing maintenance tasks with [[Verpine/Legends|Verpine]] technicians. During this time, R2-K7 showed an amount of cruelty that could have been due to a design failure or a provoked alteration, but this wickedness made R2-K7 a valued member of the Council.<ref name="AIR" />
